observations.polarity: left: physical depletion; right: spiritual/emotional cost
observations.summary: The passage contrasts the physical toll on Dan's body with the implied spiritual or emotional cost of his journey, highlighting a tension between bodily exhaustion and inner struggle.

left_evidence.quote: The expenditure registered in every tight muscle and in the way his legs moved like they belonged to someone who had been walking for much longer than one night.

right_evidence.quote: The stench hit him first—rot and surrender's sweet perfume—before the cold stone reasserted itself beneath his feet.

bridge_evidence.quote: He was back. Smaller than before.
